title: 15. The Frozen Spire
description: Cross the threshold of the far North Polar Glaciers and locate the majestic Frozen Ice Spire. It is a massive spired tower constructed entirely of blue ice blocks.
objective_text: Scale to the top of the Glacial Ice Spire

title: 16. Polar Forager
description: The freezing blizzards are brutal on your body. Hunt wild polar animals or defeat frozen zombies to stockpile food rations.
objective_text: Amass 5x Fried Chickens in your inventory

title: 17. The Red Badlands
description: Embark on a massive trek far South, leaving the polar glaciers behind. Discover the deep terracotta steps of the Red Sandstone Canyons.
objective_text: Trek deep into the southern red canyons

title: 18. The Obsidian Pyramid
description: Travel West into the dark cybernetic Neon Ruins crater and locate the glowing Neon Pyramid pinnacle.
objective_text: Discover the glowing Neon Ruins Pyramid

title: 19. Cyber Hacker
description: Hack the ancient network! Collect cybernetic grass blocks from the glowing obsidian soil to build a digital link.
objective_text: Gather 32x Grass Blocks in the ruins

title: 20. Neon Shards
description: Secure structural obsidian components. Mine stone from the deep technological crater.
objective_text: Mine and collect 16x Stone Blocks in the ruins

title: 21. Swamp Reconnaissance
description: Trek back to the murky Swamp of Sighs. Deliver construction supplies to the deep mud research outpost.
objective_text: Reach the abandoned swamp outpost coordinates

title: 22. Lava-Fried Feast
description: Voxel construction is unlimited, but the final sky climb requires maximum energy. Prepare a grand deep-fried feast.

title: 23. The Cloud Ascent
description: Ascension is at hand. Construct a massive dirt pillar or scale a mountain to reach the sky Cloud Kingdom.
objective_text: Build or climb to the sky Cloud Kingdom (Height Y >= 18)

title: 24. Cloud Scouting
description: Walk among the fluffy, semi-transparent white cloud blocks and locate the highest celestial peak of the kingdom.
objective_text: Reach the highest floating cloud isle peak

title: 25. Return to the Bazaar
description: You have conquered the infinite world, the depths and the sky. Make the final journey back to the plains village to report your cosmic discoveries to the Villager.
objective_text: Trek back and speak to the Villager at the Bazaar
